__doc: CROSS-REPO CONTRACT. This file is the single shared definitionHash vector that must exist BYTE-IDENTICALLY in both repos: mcp-open-advertising (packages/contract-hash/tests/) and cesteral-governance-layer (lib/features/governance/write-preview/__tests__/). Each repo runs its own computeDefinitionHash over `fixture` and asserts it equals `expectedDefinitionHash`. Because both repos pin the SAME input AND the SAME expected output, a silent divergence in either repo's algorithm becomes a CI failure rather than a tool that silently never reaches `attested`. If the canonicalization legitimately changes, update this file in both repos in the same coordinated change.

fixture.name: crossrepo_update_entity
fixture.description: Cross-repo golden fixture. Edited in lockstep across both repos.
